Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Veshran]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Veshran is Shyrax's twin brother and governs a colony in Alliance space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Veshran has remained independent from Felrex through repositioning and alliances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Veshran is the twin brother of Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Veshran has a fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Veshran leads a Karoshan legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Veshran has people that the crew needed to cover the retreat of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Veshran is a Karoshan prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Veshran is a male Karoshan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
